text: NVIDIA reported Q4 earnings on February 25, 2026, after the bell, delivering what was characterized as a record quarter. However, market reaction was unfavorable, with NVDA stock falling approximately 5.5% to 5.6% in the session following the earnings release on Thursday, February 26. According to Bloomberg commentary, investors were not impressed by the company's latest sales forecast, signaling concerns about potential overheating in the AI trade despite the stellar earnings beat.
